commit.subject: LU-18943 obdclass: fix typo
commit.message:
LU-18943 obdclass: fix typo

Lu_cache_shrink_scan is incorrectly counting the number of objects
freed. Let's fix it.

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-12815
Signed-off-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey.lyashkov@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I21269ee0e686739fe4c9e97d4601da79f0d2f3b5
